title: Baklava Rosewater Kulfi
description: A creamy Indian dessert influenced by North African flavors.
instructions: Combine heavy cream, rosewater, and cardamom in a saucepan.
Heat over medium heat until warm.
Add granulated sugar and stir until dissolved.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Combine milk and baklava in a blender and blend until smooth.
Add floral honey and rose petals to the milk mixture and blend until well combined.
Pour the warm cream mixture into the milk mixture and blend until well combined.
Pour into popsicle molds and freeze for at least 4 hours.
